unexpected_finds.summary: Q-214-1 LOCKs (all alpha MINT-NOW) are conditional on operator Zenodo /me/uploads audit confirming no unrecorded deposit exists for Items 5/13/28. Agent confidence on true-coverage-gap is 0.75 (per prompt §2E). Operator ground-truth retires 0.75 -> 1.0 or inverts the consultation. If any of the three has an unrecorded deposit, Q-214-1 collapses to documentation-fix for that item and Q-214-3/4 moot for it.
unexpected_finds.operator_action_recommended: Run Zenodo /me/uploads audit BEFORE firing 5/15 bundle, not after. Paste count or top-20 title list from https://zenodo.org/me/uploads to agent for cross-reference.

unexpected_finds.summary: §2D agent priors on preprint-policy posture are 0.85 (ExpMath T&F) / 0.90 (JDE Elsevier) / 0.90 (JNT Elsevier). Elsevier policies are stable; T&F has historically been more variable across imprints. For Q-214-1 LOCKs to be load-bearing pre-mint, a 5-min web-check of each journal's current public preprint policy is recommended.
unexpected_finds.operator_action_recommended: 5-min web-check of T&F ExpMath + Elsevier JDE + Elsevier JNT preprint-deposit policies before 5/15 substrate-prep lands. If any sub-policy disallows pre-acceptance deposit for a specific item -> invert Q-214-1 LOCK for that item to epsilon (NEVER).

unexpected_finds.summary: Item 28 redirect-cascade file diff (Q-214-4 delta): ~10 min agent-autonomous comparison of Items 3 (ExpMath rejected) + 16 (RNT rejected) submitted PDFs vs Item 28 (JNT current, anonymized) substrate. Hard prereq for Q-214-4 LOCK resolution; soft prereq for Q-214-1c (Item 28) mint via concept-DOI metadata description content.
unexpected_finds.operator_action_recommended: Agent executes diff before 5/15 evening bundle. If substantive reframing confirmed -> Q-214-4 resolves to alpha (mint v3 only, no backdate). If essentially-same -> consider v1 backdated metadata documenting cascade lineage.

unexpected_finds.summary: PCF-2 concept-DOI 19936297 (NOT 19937196 = PCF-1 v1.3) paste-verify discipline per existing project memory applies. Items 5/13/28 deposits will mint NEW concept-DOIs (not PCF-2-related), but the paste-verify habit transfers as hygiene: confirm each new concept-DOI value before it propagates to submission_log §3 / PORTFOLIO_INVENTORY §B.
unexpected_finds.operator_action_recommended: Apply paste-verify discipline at concept-DOI mint time for each of Items 5/13/28. Verify Zenodo concept-DOI string before pasting into local records.

unexpected_finds.summary: Carneiro 7d silence-floor (2026-05-20) is the higher-priority operator-attention claim through next week. Q-214-2 epsilon resolution is partly defensive against accidentally coupling Zenodo-mint operator-attention with arXiv-endorsement reply-watch attention. If Carneiro replies in-window (high-probability outcome), Q-214-2 may upgrade to alpha 5/15 within bandwidth.
unexpected_finds.operator_action_recommended: Monitor Carneiro inbox 2026-05-13 17:39 JST through 2026-05-20 (7d soft) / 2026-05-27 (14d hard). If reply lands in-window, re-evaluate Q-214-2 LOCK toward alpha (5/15 single-window bundle) if bandwidth permits.

unexpected_finds.summary: V214 Q-214-6 epsilon PROMOTE-WEAKER-VERSION at confidence 0.72 canonicalizes Items 21/26/27/29 baseline as recommendation-class standing rule. Refined text: 'Recommendation: every manuscript submitted to a peer-reviewed venue SHOULD have a corresponding Zenodo concept-DOI minted within 14 days of journal-portal submission, anonymized version matching submitted manuscript. MANDATORY: before any post-rejection re-route substrate-prep begins, the rejected manuscript's most-recent submitted version MUST be Zenodo-deposited (concept-DOI if first deposit, version-DOI if updating existing concept-DOI). Software-class deposits follow the same MANDATORY rule for any code release referenced in a submitted manuscript.' STATUS: PROMOTED 2026-05-14 ~08:30 JST.
unexpected_finds.operator_action_recommended: Memory stored under subject 'zenodo deposit discipline' at 2026-05-14 ~08:30 JST. Future submission-prep sessions consult this memory for default Zenodo-mint timing.
